cards.name: Harry Freedomwizard
cards.desc: He wields a wand carved from a baseball bat and dreams of the freedom to cast spells in the suburbs.
cards.imagePrompt: Digital art portrait of a young boy in a denim robe holding a wooden bat-wand, suburban sunset background, rustic American aesthetic.
cards.imagePromptBack: Silver metallic finish, minimalist stats panel on the left, card number 001, holographic foil text, clean sans-serif typography.
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: Born in the heartland, Harry discovered his latent magical abilities while trying to hit a curveball with a cursed hickory stick. He now wanders the state fairs looking for his destiny.

cards.name: Hermione Ledger
cards.desc: A meticulous accountant of the arcane who ensures every spell cast is properly filed on her taxes.
cards.imagePrompt: Vector illustration of a studious girl in a blazer holding a calculator and a parchment scroll, crisp lighting, collegiate palette.
cards.imagePromptBack: Silver border with clean white text, stats panel centered below the portrait, silver holographic finish, card number 002.
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: Hermione manages the magical regulations bureau with an iron fist and a red pen. She knows that even a levitation charm requires a permit in this jurisdiction.

cards.name: Ron Truckstop
cards.desc: Known for his love of magical snacks, he spent his youth guarding the enchanted vending machines of the Midwest.
cards.imagePrompt: Artistic rendering of a lanky youth in a flannel shirt eating a glowing pastry, neon diner sign background, warm moody lighting.
cards.imagePromptBack: Common silver theme, stats panel aligned right, holographic finish, card number 003, crisp readability.
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: Always hungry for adventure, Ron spent seasons working at the mystic roadside diners that keep the magical highways running. He never leaves home without a snack.

cards.name: Draco Dollar-Sign
cards.desc: He believes that the true power of sorcery lies in real estate holdings and aggressive portfolio management.
cards.imagePrompt: Sleek digital art of a posh young man in a silk suit holding a golden staff, high-end skyscraper background, expensive aesthetic.
cards.imagePromptBack: Silver aesthetic, stats table, holographic accents, card 004, professional layout.
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: He measures magic in market capitalization rather than mana points. His family empire spans the continent, but his heart is firmly invested in luxury goods.

cards.name: Neville Pave-it
cards.desc: An apprentice landscape architect who uses growth charms to keep the neighborhood shrubs perfectly trimmed.
cards.imagePrompt: Detailed art of a gardener boy with magical shears, blooming clover motif, soft green and brown color palette, whimsical style.
cards.imagePromptBack: Silver border design, stats layout, card 004, holographic foil effect.
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: Neville is the secret architect behind the pristine lawns of the magical suburbs. He believes that every plant deserves a chance to grow, especially weeds.

cards.name: Luna Looney-Tuner
cards.desc: The local radio DJ who broadcasts secret messages through static and cosmic background radiation.
cards.imagePrompt: Atmospheric art of a girl wearing oversized headphones and nebula-patterned clothes, radio tower background, purple and blue tones.
cards.imagePromptBack: Green uncommon border, stats panel with energy graph, holographic finish, card number 006.
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: Luna captures the unseen signals that drift across the plains. Listen closely to the static, and you might hear the future of the world being whispered.

cards.name: Ginny Gas-Tank
cards.desc: A racing prodigy who enchants muscle cars to run on pure ozone and lightning strikes.
cards.imagePrompt: Dynamic action shot of a girl leaning against a glowing metallic racing vehicle, sparks flying, desert highway, high contrast art.
cards.imagePromptBack: Uncommon green border, technical stats layout, holographic trim, card number 007.
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: When the road stretches out for miles, Ginny is the fastest thing on it. She treats her engine like a living beast that needs a firm, magical hand.

cards.name: Seamus Smokestack
cards.desc: He specializes in industrial-grade alchemy, purifying the polluted rivers of the forbidden zone.
cards.imagePrompt: Gritty digital art of a youth holding a bubbling test tube, refinery pipes in the background, charcoal and industrial orange tones.
cards.imagePromptBack: Uncommon green design, stats grid, holographic finish, card number 008.
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: The cleanup crew of the magical world is often overlooked, but Seamus works tirelessly to reverse the damage caused by unregulated potion manufacturing.

cards.name: Dean Dribbler
cards.desc: He uses minor gravity-defying charms to become the greatest point guard in the mystical streetball league.
cards.imagePrompt: Cool sports-themed art of a player with a glowing basketball, urban court backdrop, sunset lighting, vibrant style.
cards.imagePromptBack: Green border, stats panel with sports icons, holographic finish, card number 009.
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: In the underground courts of the city, Dean’s moves are legendary. He calls them physics-bending, the refs call them a technical violation of reality.

cards.name: Professor McMurica
cards.desc: An elderly sorceress who protects the constitution of the magical realm from those who would undermine it.
cards.imagePrompt: Regal portrait of an older woman with a star-spangled cloak, library of magical law books, dignified style, blue and gold hues.
cards.imagePromptBack: Blue star-tier border, stats breakdown, embossed holographic finish, card number 010.
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: She is the stern guardian of the rules. Do not cross her path while holding a wand, for she knows every clause of the magical bylaws by heart.

cards.name: Albus Appletree
cards.desc: The wise headmaster of a school located inside a giant hollowed-out oak tree in the Midwest.
cards.imagePrompt: Ethereal painting of an old man with a long beard holding a glowing wooden staff, forest interior light, magical aura.
cards.imagePromptBack: Blue star-tier aesthetic, stats panel with gold font, holographic sheen, card number 011.
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: His wisdom is deep as the roots of his home. Many travel from coast to coast just to ask his advice on the most trivial of life's mysteries.

cards.name: Severus Shadow-Whisper
cards.desc: A double agent of the secret service who hides his true allegiance behind a mask of indifference.
cards.imagePrompt: Moody digital character art of a man in a black trenchcoat, silhouettes of city streets, dark blue and grey tones.
cards.imagePromptBack: Star blue border, detailed stats, holographic finish, card number 012.
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: He plays both sides of the curtain, ensuring that neither the light nor the dark ever fully wins. Silence is his loudest weapon.

cards.name: Sirius Star-Gazer
cards.desc: A rugged traveler who maps the constellations to unlock the hidden gateways between states.
cards.imagePrompt: Adventure-themed art of a man with a telescope and map, night sky background, cosmic dust aesthetic, detailed linework.
cards.imagePromptBack: Blue border design, stats layout, holographic finish, card number 013.
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: When the moon sits at the right angle, he can step through the space between stars. He keeps the secrets of the galaxy in his pack.

cards.name: Bellatrix Boulevard
cards.desc: A chaotic spell-caster who left a trail of neon ruins across the neon-lit avenues of the metropolis.
cards.imagePrompt: Intense energy-focused art of a woman holding vibrant violet flames, city boulevard background, chaotic lighting, purple palette.
cards.imagePromptBack: Superstar purple border, technical stats, holographic shimmer, card number 014.
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: She is the storm that hit the city, a whirlwind of uncontrolled energy. Many still talk about the night the streetlights turned into serpents.

cards.name: Lucius Ledger-Lord
cards.desc: Once the king of the corporate magical world, he manipulated the economy of potions for personal gain.
cards.imagePrompt: Sophisticated art of a man in a pinstripe suit with a golden cane, high-rise boardroom background, purple and gold tones.
cards.imagePromptBack: Superstar purple border, stats table, holographic finish, card number 015.
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: He built an empire on debt and charm. Even now, in exile, he controls the board from the shadows of his penthouse office.

cards.name: Remus Rainfall
cards.desc: A weather-wizard who disappeared during the great drought, leaving behind only the scent of ozone.
cards.imagePrompt: Mystical art of a man walking through a storm, raindrops suspended in time, lightning flash, purple and dark grey palette.
cards.imagePromptBack: Superstar purple theme, stats layout, holographic finish, card number 016.
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: He controlled the clouds to save the farms, but the weight of the sky eventually became too much. He is the legend of the lost summer.

cards.name: Voldy-Mortgage
cards.desc: The shadow-tyrant who sought to foreclose on the entire magical continent to consolidate power.
cards.imagePrompt: Menacing digital illustration of a hooded creature with glowing red eyes, shattered building background, gold and black theme.
cards.imagePromptBack: Legendary gold border, stats card, heavy holographic embossing, card number 017.
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: His name was never spoken, only signed on legal documents that drained the magic from the land. He remains the ultimate threat to the republic.

cards.name: Godric Grit
cards.desc: The original frontier architect who founded the academy on the back of a migratory mountain range.
cards.imagePrompt: Epic portrait of a pioneer-style wizard holding a mountain-carved sword, rugged beard, dawn sun, gold hues.
cards.imagePromptBack: Legendary gold border, detailed stats, holographic finish, card number 018.
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: They say he laid the first stone of the school by hand. He represents the hard work and gritty determination of the founding magical generation.

cards.name: Salazar Slate
cards.desc: The master of foundation stones who built the underground labyrinth where the forbidden rituals are stored.
cards.imagePrompt: Intimidating art of a man in ancient stone-forged armor, cavern background, glowing runes, gold and obsidian palettes.
cards.imagePromptBack: Gold legendary theme, stats layout, holographic finish, card number 019.
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: He saw the world as a structure to be controlled. His legacy is etched into the very foundations of the earth beneath the main academy.

cards.name: Rowena Real-estate
cards.desc: She organized the very first governing council to regulate the chaotic energies of the untamed wilderness.
cards.imagePrompt: Majestic portrait of a woman with a scrolls-belt and crown, hall of government background, gold filigree, high-contrast style.
cards.imagePromptBack: Gold legendary border, statistics dashboard, holographic finish, card number 020.
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: Governance and magic were her twins. She ensured that the new continent would be a place of order, not just chaos and raw power.

cards.name: Cletus the Wand-Maker
cards.desc: He whittles his wands out of reclaimed backyard oak and dreams of pure magic.
cards.imagePrompt: A grizzled man carving a magic wand on a porch, rustic style, digital art trading card
cards.imagePromptBack: Distressed wood background, green stats panel, copper finish.
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: Cletus believes a wand should hold a grudge and a good secret. Don't ask him where he gets his phoenix feathers.

cards.name: Deputy Dementor
cards.desc: Patrolling the local DMV to ensure no one leaves with a smile.
cards.imagePrompt: A hooded figure in a cheap sheriff's vest holding a badge, dark misty swamp background
cards.imagePromptBack: Cold blue steel aesthetic, stats grid, cold matte finish.
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: The Deputy doesn't need a search warrant to drain your optimism. He works the graveyard shift at the county line.

cards.name: Larry the Lightning-Scarred
cards.desc: Got his scar from an unfortunate run-in with a backyard transformer during a storm.
cards.imagePrompt: A teenager in a hoodie with a glowing scar on his forehead, electric sparks nearby
cards.imagePromptBack: Neon blue circuit board design, gold stats display, glossy finish.
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: Larry claims he was chosen by destiny, but his neighbor says he was just trying to jump his BMX over a live wire.

cards.name: Granger the Gearhead
cards.desc: She can rebuild a combustion-engine broomstick in less than ten minutes flat.
cards.imagePrompt: A teenage girl with grease smudges on her face holding a wrench, steampunk workshop
cards.imagePromptBack: Oil-stained paper aesthetic, silver stats border, metallic finish.
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: Why use charms when you have high-octane fuel and a bit of elbow grease? She makes the engine purr like a dragon.

cards.name: Potter the Quarterback
cards.desc: Throws the Golden Snitch like a perfectly spiraled pigskin across the stadium.
cards.imagePrompt: A athletic wizard in a gridiron jersey, holding a glowing ball, stadium lights, cinematic
cards.imagePromptBack: Leather-texture background, gold stats framing, holographic finish.
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: He's the captain of the state championship team. When Potter takes the field, even the goalposts start cheering.

cards.name: Big Al of House Slyther
cards.desc: Always looking for the shortcut to get the most candy on Halloween.
cards.imagePrompt: A cunning boy in a green letterman jacket, smirk on his face, suburban street
cards.imagePromptBack: Emerald green felt backing, stats chart, matte finish.
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: Big Al knows which houses give out full-sized candy bars and which ones are protected by anti-theft hexes.

cards.name: Coach Dumbledore
cards.desc: He’s seen every play in the book and a few that are illegal in three states.
cards.imagePrompt: An elderly man in a velvet coaching jacket, long white beard, whistle around neck
cards.imagePromptBack: Vellum parchment style, gold-leaf stats, embossed finish.
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: A legend of the game. He doesn't need a playbook when he can read the opposition's mind from the sidelines.

cards.name: Snape the Shop Teacher
cards.desc: He takes ten points from your grade if your sawdust isn't swept into a perfect pile.
cards.imagePrompt: A stern man in a dusty apron, holding a caliper, school woodshop background
cards.imagePromptBack: Blackboard-style background, chalk-white stats, matte finish.
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: He teaches precision and misery in equal measure. Mess up a wood joint and you're cleaning the shop floor.

cards.name: Luna the Conspiracy Theorist
cards.desc: She claims the local radio station is run by invisible government pixies.
cards.imagePrompt: A girl wearing tin-foil hat and oversized glasses, starry night background
cards.imagePromptBack: Cosmic purple background, neon star stats, holographic finish.
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: They call her odd, but she's the only one who noticed the school bus has been driving in loops for three weeks.

cards.name: Weasley Twin Hustlers
cards.desc: Two heads are better than one when you’re running a shell game in the cafeteria.
cards.imagePrompt: Identical twin pranksters, bright orange hair, holding playing cards, mischievous smiles
cards.imagePromptBack: Red and orange checkerboard, bold stats, glossy finish.
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: They invented the 'Three-Card Monte' of the wizarding world. One twin distracts you, the other takes your lunch money.

cards.name: Sheriff Hagrid
cards.desc: He keeps the giant guard dogs at the county line and the moonshine in the shed.
cards.imagePrompt: A giant man in a sheriff uniform, rustic cabin background, massive hound by his side
cards.imagePromptBack: Wood-grain texture, heavy-duty stats display, matte finish.
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: You don't cross the county line when Hagrid is on duty. He’s got enough deputies in his backyard to start a war.

cards.name: Malfoy the Rich Kid
cards.desc: He bought his way onto the team with a custom-built, carbon-fiber broomstick.
cards.imagePrompt: A blonde boy in an expensive tailored suit, arrogant expression, luxury car nearby
cards.imagePromptBack: Platinum silver background, black stats, metallic finish.
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: His dad owns the local wand-manufacturing plant, and it shows in his attitude. Money can't buy talent, but it helps.

cards.name: McGonagall the Principal
cards.desc: Don't run in the halls, or she will turn you into a paperclip before you reach detention.
cards.imagePrompt: A sharp-dressed woman with glasses, intense stare, school hallway, regal stance
cards.imagePromptBack: Plaid pattern background, stats grid, satin finish.
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: The iron lady of the school board. She has a strict no-nonsense policy and an even stricter transfiguration spell.

cards.name: Neville the Gardener
cards.desc: He knows every plant that can snap your fingers off and which ones cure the common cold.
cards.imagePrompt: A bashful boy with a trowel, wearing a greenhouse apron, carnivorous plants around
cards.imagePromptBack: Leaf-green background, earth-tone stats, matte finish.
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: Neville used to be the kid who tripped over his own feet, now he’s the only one who can handle the greenhouse.

cards.name: Filch the Custodian
cards.desc: Always creeping around the dark halls with a mop and a grudge.
cards.imagePrompt: A hunched man holding a lantern and a broom, dark school basement, creepy shadows
cards.imagePromptBack: Dusty grey concrete aesthetic, faint stats, rough textured finish.
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: He missed his chance to be a mage, so he spends his life scrubbing the floors where the magic happens.

cards.name: Cedric the Rodeo Champ
cards.desc: He rode the fastest Bucking Broom in the Midwest circuit for three years running.
cards.imagePrompt: A handsome boy in a western vest, holding a magic lasso, rodeo arena background
cards.imagePromptBack: Sunset orange sky, leather stats panel, glossy finish.
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: A pure-hearted competitor. He earned his spurs on the broom-rodeo circuit before vanishing into the night.

cards.name: Padma the Debate Captain
cards.desc: She has a spell to counter every argument before you even open your mouth.
cards.imagePrompt: A girl in a school uniform holding a gavel, books stacked high behind her
cards.imagePromptBack: Deep navy blue, crisp white stats, matte finish.
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: Winning the debate is easy when you’ve practiced silence-inducing charms on your opponents.

cards.name: Voldy the Real Estate Mogul
cards.desc: He’s trying to buy the school to turn it into a high-rise luxury condo development.
cards.imagePrompt: A pale, suit-wearing man with a cold stare, skyscraper background, dark aura
cards.imagePromptBack: Monochrome black and white, sharp stats grid, matte finish.
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: He has no nose for local culture, just for profit. He wants to tear down the historic library for a parking deck.

cards.name: Cho the Tennis Ace
cards.desc: Her serves are enchanted with a 'curveball' hex that defies the laws of physics.
cards.imagePrompt: A teenage girl holding a tennis racket, neon glowing tennis ball, court background
cards.imagePromptBack: Tennis green, yellow stats, high-gloss finish.
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: She moves across the court like she's apparating. The ball is just a distraction from her lethal accuracy.

cards.name: Dobby the House Elf-Consultant
cards.desc: He’ll wash your dishes, fold your socks, and give you stock market advice.
cards.imagePrompt: A small creature in a mismatched sweater, holding a laundry basket, bright home kitchen
cards.imagePromptBack: Soft cotton texture, bright stats, matte finish.
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: Dobby is a free elf now, and he charges a premium for his laundry services and investment tips.

cards.name: Kyle the Quaffle-Back
cards.desc: He hits harder than a rogue bludger on a Friday night.
cards.imagePrompt: Young wizard in a varsity leather jacket holding a quaffle, stadium lights, digital art trading card
cards.imagePromptBack: Distressed denim background with stats panel in red and gold, holographic edge finish
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: Kyle has never read a book, but he can throw a ball through a hoop from three zip codes away. He's the MVP of the basement draft league.

cards.name: Trucker Hagrid
cards.desc: Always has a fresh bucket of KFC and a story about a dragon on the interstate.
cards.imagePrompt: Hagrid with a trucker hat and long beard leaning against a massive semi-truck, sunset background
cards.imagePromptBack: Plaid flannel textured background, stats box shaped like a license plate, matte finish
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: I shouldn't have told you that, but the giant spiders are migrating down Route 66 this season.

cards.name: Cletus the Custodian
cards.desc: He uses a mop, but he calls it a wand and claims it cleans souls.
cards.imagePrompt: Old wizard in janitor overalls holding a mop as a scepter, dark school hallway, moody lighting
cards.imagePromptBack: Floor wax swirl pattern background, stats panel in yellow hazard stripes, semi-gloss finish
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: Cletus has seen things in the boys' bathroom that would turn a Dementor's stomach.

cards.name: Mall-Rat Malfoy
cards.desc: Spending his dad's galleons on designer robes and hair gel at the local strip mall.
cards.imagePrompt: Blonde wizard teenager with heavily slicked hair, leather vest, mall arcade background, vibrant
cards.imagePromptBack: Neon aesthetic background, stats panel with silver inlay, holographic card finish
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: My father owns the entire food court, and he’ll hear about your poor fashion choices immediately!

cards.name: Suburban Sorceress Hermione
cards.desc: Chief of the PTA and master of the domestic charm spell.
cards.imagePrompt: Woman in an apron waving a wand while a lawnmower pushes itself, suburban house exterior
cards.imagePromptBack: Pastel wallpaper pattern background, elegant font for stats, matte laminated finish
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: If you don't file the spell permits for your hedge trimming, expect a very sternly worded letter from the HOA.

cards.name: Shotgun Dumbledore
cards.desc: The headmaster who guards the school with a 12-gauge and a twinkle in his eye.
cards.imagePrompt: Wise old wizard with a long beard holding a double-barrel shotgun, glowing blue aura, majestic pose
cards.imagePromptBack: Starry night sky background, gold-embossed stats panel, premium lenticular finish
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: Happiness can be found in the darkest of times, provided you remember to keep your safety off.

cards.name: Debra the Diviner
cards.desc: She reads fortunes exclusively through expired coupons and lottery scratchers.
cards.imagePrompt: Middle-aged witch sitting at a kitchen table with crystal ball and piles of junk mail, low-key lighting
cards.imagePromptBack: Coupon-clipping collage background, stats panel in ink-stamped style, matte finish
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: The stars say you're going to get a 2-for-1 deal on frozen peas, but your love life remains a disaster.

cards.name: Pick-up Truck Potter
cards.desc: The boy who lived to drive circles in the field.
cards.imagePrompt: Harry with a flat-brim cap driving a red Ford truck, lightning scar visible, rural field sunset
cards.imagePromptBack: Mud splatter effect background, stats panel with tire tread border, glossy finish
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: He survived the dark lord, but he still can't parallel park his dual-wheel truck to save his life.

cards.name: Biker Sirius
cards.desc: Escaped Azkaban to live the open road dream on a Harley.
cards.imagePrompt: Wizard with tattoos on a motorcycle, leather jacket, highway background, dust in the air
cards.imagePromptBack: Chrome and leather pattern background, stats panel in burnt orange, rough texture finish
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: I don't need a map when the road is paved with defiance and high-octane fuel.

cards.name: Barista Snape
cards.desc: He will judge your latte order with a sneer that haunts your dreams.
cards.imagePrompt: Severe looking man behind an espresso machine, dark apron, dimly lit coffee shop background
cards.imagePromptBack: Coffee bean stain motif, stats panel in dark slate, matte finish
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: Obviously, your choice of oat milk represents a fundamental character flaw that cannot be corrected.

cards.name: Deep-Fryer Dobby
cards.desc: The house-elf who found his calling in the fast-food industry.
cards.imagePrompt: House-elf in a paper hat holding a frying basket, sparkling oil splash, cartoonish digital style
cards.imagePromptBack: Grease-spotted paper bag style, stats panel in vibrant burger-joint colors, metallic finish
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: Dobby is a free elf, and Dobby makes the crispest tenders in the tri-state area!

cards.name: Line-Backer Ron
cards.desc: Eating chicken legs and crushing quarterbacks on the gridiron.
cards.imagePrompt: Ginger wizard in football pads holding a chicken leg, stadium field, action pose
cards.imagePromptBack: Turf green background, stats panel in team colors, high-gloss finish
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: He's not the brightest player on the field, but he’s the only one who can cast a touchdown hex.

cards.name: Militia Moody
cards.desc: Constant vigilance, especially when the neighborhood watch is on patrol.
cards.imagePrompt: Wizard with a cybernetic eye and combat vest, camouflage background, gritty digital art
cards.imagePromptBack: Tactical grid background, stats panel in hazard orange, sandpaper-touch finish
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: I’ve got eyes in the back of my head, and they’re all looking for suspicious activity in the cul-de-sac.

cards.name: Country Club Narcissa
cards.desc: She handles the club finances with a cold, elegant indifference.
cards.imagePrompt: Elegant witch with sun hat and golf club, manicured lawn, luxurious clubhouse backdrop
cards.imagePromptBack: Polished marble pattern background, stats panel with gold foil, silk-touch finish
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: Membership is a privilege, not a right, and you clearly have not earned the privilege.

cards.name: Tailgate Tonks
cards.desc: She changes her hair color to match the team she is rooting for that week.
cards.imagePrompt: Young woman with neon blue hair and a jersey, waving a flag, tailgating party background
cards.imagePromptBack: Confetti and streamers background, stats panel in electric purple, holographic glitter finish
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: Win or lose, my hair is going to look fantastic, and the drinks will be cold.

cards.name: Bounty Hunter Bellatrix
cards.desc: The most feared debt collector in the magical underworld.
cards.imagePrompt: Woman with wild hair holding a lasso, desert badlands background, intense eyes
cards.imagePromptBack: Wanted poster design, stats panel in weathered parchment, rugged finish
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: You can run, you can hide, but you owe this magical bank three thousand galleons, and I'm here to collect.

cards.name: Garage Band Fred & George
cards.desc: They play punk rock spells that always end in a minor explosion.
cards.imagePrompt: Twin wizards with band instruments, garage full of magical trash, chaotic lighting
cards.imagePromptBack: Graffiti covered wall background, stats panel in neon spray paint, matte finish
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: Turn the amps to eleven, the neighbors are complaining, and the neighbors are about to be frogs.

cards.name: Hiker Luna
cards.desc: She tracks cryptids through the National Parks with nothing but a map and dreams.
cards.imagePrompt: Girl with oversized hiking backpack and binoculars, wilderness mountain background, peaceful
cards.imagePromptBack: Topographic map pattern background, stats panel in forest green, soft touch finish
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: The Nargles are hiding in the GPS signal, but I think I found a footprint of a Sasquatch-Wizard.

cards.name: Repo Man Lupin
cards.desc: He only works the nights when the moon is full, making his job very difficult.
cards.imagePrompt: Wizard in a worn-out trench coat standing under a bright full moon, city street
cards.imagePromptBack: Wolf fur texture background, stats panel in silver, matte finish
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: I have to get this car back to the dealership before I turn into a werewolf, so please step out.

cards.name: Elder Legend Merlin
cards.desc: The original wizard who paved the way for every magical redneck.
cards.imagePrompt: Ancient wizard with glowing staff and Americana robes, swirling vortex, legendary aura
cards.imagePromptBack: Golden celestial chart background, stats panel with intricate border, foil embossed finish
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: I taught this land how to brew shine and cast light before your mountains were even hills.

cards.name: Cletus the Custodian
cards.desc: He doesn't need a wand to fix the plumbing that the ghosts keep breaking.
cards.imagePrompt: Grumpy elderly janitor holding a glowing mop, Hogwarts-style basement, cinematic lighting, digital art trading card.
cards.imagePromptBack: Distressed parchment background with rusted pipe borders, stats panel in bottom right, matte finish.
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: Keeping the dungeons clean is a thankless job, but someone has to mop up after the troll incidents.

cards.name: Sheriff Hagridson
cards.desc: He patrols the Forbidden Forest on a Harley Davidson instead of a motorcycle.
cards.imagePrompt: Giant bearded man in a leather vest riding a flying motorcycle, desert highway background, trading card art.
cards.imagePromptBack: Leather-texture backdrop with sheriff badge motifs, stats displayed in a wooden scroll frame, gloss finish.
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: The law of the land is enforced by the biggest man in the county. Nobody messes with the Sheriff.

cards.name: Dwayne 'The Rock' Troll
cards.desc: Finally realized his dream of joining the wrestling team instead of guarding bathrooms.
cards.imagePrompt: Muscular troll wearing a wrestling championship belt, arena floodlights, dynamic action pose, digital illustration.
cards.imagePromptBack: Neon blue and gold color scheme, stats in a metallic frame, holographic foil finish.
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: Can you smell what the Troll is cooking? It's usually something quite pungent.

cards.name: Barista Hermione
cards.desc: She brews potions and espressos with equal efficiency and a dash of sass.
cards.imagePrompt: Young witch wearing a flannel apron, steam rising from a magical coffee mug, coffee shop interior, trading card.
cards.imagePromptBack: Rustic wood and coffee sleeve textures, stats listed on a menu board motif, matte finish.
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: One double-shot espresso with a hint of Felix Felicis for that morning meeting.

cards.name: Senator Albus Dumble-D
cards.desc: He runs the school with the firm grasp of a veteran politician and the wisdom of an eagle.
cards.imagePrompt: Elderly wizard in a starry suit and tie, eagle pin on lapel, white marble podium background, regal portrait.
cards.imagePromptBack: Gold-leaf and velvet red design, complex stats display with intricate patterns, gold foil finish.
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: A vote for Dumble-D is a vote for magical excellence and national security.

cards.name: Pizza Delivery Hedwig
cards.desc: Guaranteed delivery within 30 minutes or the curse is on us.
cards.imagePrompt: White snowy owl wearing a pizza delivery cap, carrying a box, sunset city skyline, digital painting.
cards.imagePromptBack: Checked red and white tablecloth pattern, stats arranged like a delivery receipt, glossy finish.
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: Hot and fresh from the oven to the owlery, no matter the weather.

cards.name: Cowboy Draco
cards.desc: He claims his family owns the biggest ranch in the wizarding world.
cards.imagePrompt: Blond boy in a Stetson hat and duster coat, holding a wand like a revolver, desert background, trading card.
cards.imagePromptBack: Rustic western wood texture, stats in a wanted-poster style frame, matte finish.
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: My father will hear about the quality of this cattle feed.

cards.name: Quarterback Ron
cards.desc: He finally found his calling passing the Quaffle like a pro gridiron hero.
cards.imagePrompt: Red-haired teenager in football gear, holding a Quaffle, stadium crowds blurred in background, action shot.
cards.imagePromptBack: Gridiron yard lines on green turf, stats in a scoreboard motif, semi-gloss finish.
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: Touchdown! Gryffindor leads by seven as the whistle blows.

cards.name: Professor Snape-a-Roo
cards.desc: A master of potions and sarcastic commentary in the classroom.
cards.imagePrompt: Slovenly wizard with stringy hair and black robes, glowing green cauldron, dark dungeon, trading card.
cards.imagePromptBack: Parchment stained with ink and potion spills, stats in an apothecary ledger style, rough finish.
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: I can teach you how to bewitch the mind and ensnare the senses, if you aren't as dense as a brick.

cards.name: Suburban Neville
cards.desc: His backyard herb garden is the envy of the entire neighborhood association.
cards.imagePrompt: Young man in gardening gloves, giant glowing Mandrake in a suburban backyard, digital art.
cards.imagePromptBack: Floral patterns and picket fence styling, stats in a garden club document frame, matte finish.
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: The Mimbulus Mimbletonia is actually quite relaxing once you get used to the goo.

cards.name: Trucker Sirius
cards.desc: He’s been on the run, driving his 18-wheeler across the country for years.
cards.imagePrompt: Man with long hair and a beard, cabin of a large semi-truck, rain-slicked highway, trading card.
cards.imagePromptBack: Road map and asphalt texture, stats in a trucker logbook layout, gloss finish.
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: I’m just a drifter, looking for the next exit and a decent diner.

cards.name: Congresswoman McGonagall
cards.desc: She keeps the legislative body in check with a strict code of conduct.
cards.imagePrompt: Severe woman in a sharp blazer and cat-eye glasses, capitol building background, trading card portrait.
cards.imagePromptBack: Patriotic red, white, and blue design, stats in a formal document style, silver foil finish.
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: Order! We will maintain decorum or I shall transform this entire chamber into a courtroom.

cards.name: Skater Luna
cards.desc: She finds the most interesting paths while riding her magical skateboard.
cards.imagePrompt: Girl with whimsical expression riding a levitating skateboard, colorful graffiti background, trading card.
cards.imagePromptBack: Street art patterns and bright neon colors, stats in a skate-label aesthetic, glossy finish.
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: The Nargles live in the axles; that's why it wobbles when you do a kickflip.

cards.name: Firefighter Weasley Twins
cards.desc: They use experimental enchantments to stop forest fires and chaos.
cards.imagePrompt: Two gingers in heavy firefighter gear, holding wands pointed at a magical flame, digital card.
cards.imagePromptBack: Embers and charred wood textures, stats in a fire-department patch style, matte finish.
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: Double the trouble, but twice the fire suppression capability.

cards.name: Gamer Dudley
cards.desc: He’s undefeated in the latest Wizard Conquest RPG on his console.
cards.imagePrompt: Large boy sitting on a couch with a glowing controller, multiple monitors, neon lit room, digital art.
cards.imagePromptBack: Pixels and circuit board motifs, stats in a screen-overlay style, glossy finish.
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: I’m level 99. You guys are still grinding in the mud.

cards.name: Construction Worker Filch
cards.desc: Building the new wing of the castle with enchanted bricks and a bad mood.
cards.imagePrompt: Man in a yellow hard hat holding a magical blueprint, castle construction site, trading card.
cards.imagePromptBack: Blueprint lines on blue paper, stats in a construction-permit layout, matte finish.
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: Don't touch the blueprints or I'll have you suspended from the rafters.

cards.name: Investment Banker Lucius
cards.desc: Always closing deals in the boardrooms of Wall Street and the Ministry.
cards.imagePrompt: Elegant blond man in a tailored pinstripe suit, Wall Street background, holding a briefcase, digital art.
cards.imagePromptBack: Stock tickers and gold coins, stats in a ledger table format, metallic foil finish.
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: There is no such thing as a bad investment if you control the outcome.

cards.name: Gym Teacher Hooch
cards.desc: She keeps the students in shape with intense broom-flying circuits.
cards.imagePrompt: Exhausted woman in a whistle-and-tracksuit outfit, flying broom in hand, sports field, digital art.
cards.imagePromptBack: Whistle and stopwatch design, stats in a stopwatch aesthetic, semi-gloss finish.
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: Move it! I want to see you hit 60 miles per hour on those bristles!

cards.name: Summer Camp Harry
cards.desc: Learning to survive and thrive during his first summer at wizard camp.
cards.imagePrompt: A young boy with a tie-dye shirt holding a makeshift wand, campfire background, summer vibes.
cards.imagePromptBack: Camp patch embroidery style, stats on a wood-grain sign background, matte finish.
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: I survived the ropes course and the potion-brewing contest.

cards.name: Detective Moody
cards.desc: His glass eye sees the truth even through the most deceptive illusions.
cards.imagePrompt: Gritty detective with a magical prosthetic eye, trench coat, rain-soaked city street, trading card.
cards.imagePromptBack: Case file and evidence board design, stats in redacted-folder style, gloss finish.
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: CONSTANT VIGILANCE! The bad guys don't take a day off, and neither do I.

cards.name: Cletus Crouch, Auror Deputy
cards.desc: Patrols the Forbidden Bayou looking for illegal wand smuggling operations.
cards.imagePrompt: Auror wearing a ten-gallon hat and a badge, holding a shotgun-wand hybrid, swamp background, digital art
cards.imagePromptBack: Rustic wood texture frame, leather border, stats panel in bottom right, worn brass finish, autumn colors
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: Cletus doesn't need spells when he has a double-barrel dragon-shot. He's been guarding the swamp border for thirty years.

cards.name: Brenda Bulk-Barn
cards.desc: Specializes in bulk-ordering Gillyweed for the local swim team.
cards.imagePrompt: Middle-aged woman in a striped apron, holding a giant bag of mystical herbs, fluorescent grocery store lights
cards.imagePromptBack: Receipt paper texture, holographic overlay, stats panel in center, pastel color palette
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: Brenda knows that if you're going to dive into the black lake, you're going to need more than just one serving of Gillyweed.

cards.name: Earl 'The Enchanter' Jenkins
cards.desc: A former high school quarterback who casts fireballs with a perfect spiral.
cards.imagePrompt: Young wizard in a varsity jacket, tossing a glowing ember like a football, dynamic action pose
cards.imagePromptBack: Turf texture, stadium lighting motif, stats panel on metallic side bar, glossy finish
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: Earl brings the intensity of a Friday Night Lights game to every duel. His fireball accuracy is legendary in the tri-state area.

cards.name: Sheriff Hagrid 'The Hog' Miller
cards.desc: The only man in the county who can legally tame a semi-truck sized hippogriff.
cards.imagePrompt: Giant bearded man in a flannel sheriff's uniform, standing next to a monstrous hippogriff in a pickup truck bed
cards.imagePromptBack: Distressed metal plate background, gold foil stats panel, rustic finish
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: When the beast escaped the trailer, only Sheriff Miller could calm it down with a firm look and a slice of brisket.

cards.name: Tiffany Trelawney-Smith
cards.desc: Reads horoscopes in the local paper between her shifts at the mall.
cards.imagePrompt: Teen girl with excessive jewelry, crystal ball on a velvet pillow, mall atmosphere, neon lighting
cards.imagePromptBack: Zodiac wheel design, starry sky border, stats panel in bottom right, matt coating
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: Tiffany predicted you'd pull this card today. She also predicted you'd forget to pick up milk on the way home.

cards.name: Big Rig Ron
cards.desc: Transports magical artifacts across the interstate in his heavily enchanted semi-truck.
cards.imagePrompt: Trucker wizard with a beard, leaning against a cab that glows with pulsing runes, highway at sunset
cards.imagePromptBack: Road map aesthetic, speed limit sign motifs, stats panel aligned to tire tread pattern
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: Ron’s rig has seen more enchanted cargo than the entire Ministry of Magic combined. Keep your eyes on the road.

cards.name: Debbie 'Dual-Wielder' Dumbledore
cards.desc: A distant cousin who runs the local PTA with an iron fist and two holly-oak wands.
cards.imagePrompt: Woman in a sharp business suit, holding a wand in each hand, glowing power circles behind her
cards.imagePromptBack: Formal floral wallpaper pattern, gold stats overlay, premium linen texture
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: She doesn't tolerate tardiness at the bake sale and she definitely doesn't tolerate dark wizards in the school gym.

cards.name: Kyle the Quidditch Coach
cards.desc: Still wearing his championship ring from state finals twenty years ago.
cards.imagePrompt: Middle-aged man in a whistle and windbreaker, holding a broom, scoreboard background
cards.imagePromptBack: Locker room door texture, dry-erase board stats panel, semi-gloss finish
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: If you want to win the state title, you’ll listen to Kyle. He knows every loophole in the broom-racing rulebook.

cards.name: Detective Dementor-Duty Davis
cards.desc: Used to guard the prison wings until he transferred to the city task force.
cards.imagePrompt: Gritty detective in a trench coat, dark rainy city alley, glowing Patronus badge
cards.imagePromptBack: Concrete grey tones, evidence filing cabinet theme, statistics displayed as police reports
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: Davis has seen the worst of the soul-sucking underworld. He carries a chocolate bar in every pocket for emergencies.

cards.name: Chadwick 'The Charmer'
cards.desc: The most popular wizard at the local fraternity; his love potions are top-tier.
cards.imagePrompt: College student in a varsity sweater, charming smile, sparks flying from his wand tip
cards.imagePromptBack: Campus quad aesthetic, brick wall border, gold-leaf stats panel, velvet touch finish
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: It’s not technically magic if you’re just naturally that charismatic, right? Chadwick keeps the party going all night.

cards.name: Mayor McGonagall-Jones
cards.desc: She keeps the town running with strict policies and a very fast transfiguration spell.
cards.imagePrompt: Elderly woman with sharp glasses, sitting at a desk with a city seal, regal and stern expression
cards.imagePromptBack: Marble texture, city hall seal watermark, stats panel in gold, high-end matte finish
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: Under her leadership, the city has seen a 40% decrease in unauthorized dragon sightings and a 100% increase in productivity.

cards.name: Farmer Filch's Cat
cards.desc: It's just a regular cat, but it has a sixth sense for detecting magical weeds.
cards.imagePrompt: Orange tabby cat sitting on a tractor, looking suspiciously clever, farmyard backdrop
cards.imagePromptBack: Hay bale texture, yarn trail border, paw print stats panel, rustic paper finish
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: Don't let the purring fool you. This cat is the head of security for the entire vegetable patch.

cards.name: Granger the Librarian
cards.desc: She can find any book in the tri-state area using only a localized summoning charm.
cards.imagePrompt: Smart woman behind a library desk, surrounded by flying books, studious but intense
cards.imagePromptBack: Old parchment texture, ink quill border, card catalog stats panel, vintage finish
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: Shh! If you make too much noise, she might transfigure your phone into a brick. She’s strict about the library rules.

cards.name: Weasley the Woodworker
cards.desc: Carves wands out of reclaimed barn wood; they aren't pretty, but they pack a punch.
cards.imagePrompt: Red-haired man in a workshop, sawdust in the air, holding a rough-hewn wand, wood grain background
cards.imagePromptBack: Sawmill board texture, iron nail border, stats panel branded into wood, rough matte finish
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: Authentic wood. Authentic power. Each wand is tested on a sturdy oak before being sold to local conjurers.

cards.name: Snape the Science Teacher
cards.desc: His potions lab doubles as a chemistry class; he grades with extreme prejudice.
cards.imagePrompt: Stern man in a black lab coat, bubbling test tubes, chalk-covered blackboard filled with complex runes
cards.imagePromptBack: Dark slate background, periodic table of elements motif, stats panel in white chalk font
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: There will be no foolish wand-waving or silly incantations in this classroom. Follow the instructions or suffer the consequences.

cards.name: Luna the Local Barista
cards.desc: Writes cryptic messages on your coffee cup that somehow always come true.
cards.imagePrompt: Young woman with whimsical hair, behind a coffee counter, holding a latte with foam art
cards.imagePromptBack: Coffee bean pattern borders, cardboard texture, stats panel in handwritten marker
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: She says the morning brew is a window into the soul. Also, your caffeine intake is dangerously low today.

cards.name: Dobby the Delivery Driver
cards.desc: Delivers packages across the city in record time using magical shortcuts.
cards.imagePrompt: Small, swift figure on a moped, weaving through city traffic, blue-tinted movement lines
cards.imagePromptBack: Delivery box cardboard texture, stamp motifs, stats panel with tape border
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: Dobby is a good driver. Dobby knows the city shortcuts that don't exist on any map.

cards.name: Sirius the State Trooper
cards.desc: Patrols the dark highway at midnight; he's seen things you wouldn't believe.
cards.imagePrompt: Officer in a dark cruiser, red and blue lights flashing in the night, determined shadow-filled profile
cards.imagePromptBack: Asphalt texture, guardrail border, stats panel in police-report style, silver foil detail
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: He’s been wrongfully accused of speeding many times, but he’s actually the fastest man on the force.

cards.name: Bellatrix the Biker
cards.desc: Leader of the Death-Eater Motorcycle Club; she doesn't follow traffic laws.
cards.imagePrompt: Woman in a leather jacket on a roaring motorcycle, sparks flying, dark road at night
cards.imagePromptBack: Rusted chrome border, leather pattern, stats panel with skull icons, high-gloss finish
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: You hear the engine roar before you see the fire. She’s the queen of the blacktop and the terror of the toll booth.

cards.name: Uncle Vernon the Property Owner
cards.desc: He’ll evict you if you bring a wand on the property; he hates 'magic nonsense'.
cards.imagePrompt: Grumpy man with a mustache, pointing a finger at a 'No Magic' sign, suburban lawn
cards.imagePromptBack: House deed paper texture, eviction notice design, stats panel inside a stamp box
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: Vernon just wants a quiet life without owls dropping mail in his living room. Is that too much to ask?

cards.name: Tex 'The Hex' Miller
cards.desc: Shoots sparks from his wand to light his backyard barbecue.
cards.imagePrompt: Wizard in a cowboy hat holding a glowing splintered wand, digital art, trading card style.
cards.imagePromptBack: Rustic wood trim with a holster icon, stats panel in leather texture, copper foil finish.
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: Tex believes every magical duel should end with a cold beverage. Don't touch his wand while he's grilling.

cards.name: Billy Bob Broom-Jockey
cards.desc: Prefers his customized broom equipped with truck mudflaps and a horn.
cards.imagePrompt: Young wizard riding a broom with oversized wheels, sunny field background, digital art.
cards.imagePromptBack: Automotive aesthetic, tire-tread borders, neon green stats, glossy UV coating.
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: He installed a muffler on his broom to keep the neighborhood peace. It didn't work.

cards.name: Sheriff Wand-Well
cards.desc: Tries to enforce zoning laws on local magical forest spirits.
cards.imagePrompt: Sheriff holding a star-shaped wand, sunset desert backdrop, vibrant colors.
cards.imagePromptBack: Gold badge emblem top center, stats panel with parchment texture, matte finish.
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: Sheriff Wand-Well doesn't need a spell to tell you that you're parking illegally. He'll just hex your tires.

cards.name: Sweet Tea Sorceress
cards.desc: Her charms are as refreshing as a gallon of sugar-water.
cards.imagePrompt: Woman in a garden party hat holding a magical mason jar, digital illustration.
cards.imagePromptBack: Pastel floral borders, sugar-crystal font for stats, iridescent holographic foil.
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: She can turn tap water into liquid gold, but only if it's served in a plastic cup with a lemon wedge.

cards.name: Big Rig Broom Wizard
cards.desc: Hauls enchanted cargo across the interstate on a heavy-duty broom.
cards.imagePrompt: Large wizard standing next to a monstrous enchanted broom, industrial setting, digital art.
cards.imagePromptBack: Steel plate background, circuit-board stats panel, metallic silver ink finish.
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: Long-haul flights are easier when you have cruise control and a pocketful of pumpkin pasties.

cards.name: Diner Witch of the West
cards.desc: Writes the daily specials using cursive enchantments that never smudge.
cards.imagePrompt: Witch in a waitress apron holding a spellbook like a menu, retro diner background.
cards.imagePromptBack: Checkerboard floor pattern borders, menu-themed font for stats, textured matte.
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: Her coffee refills are enchanted to keep you awake for three days straight. Proceed with caution.

cards.name: Backwoods Wand-Smith
cards.desc: Carves wands from reclaimed barn wood and old whiskey barrels.
cards.imagePrompt: Old wizard carving wood with a glowing chisel, moody cabin lighting, digital art.
cards.imagePromptBack: Cedar wood grain background, iron-forged stats brackets, hand-stamped wax seal.
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: A wand made by him chooses the wizard who knows how to survive a winter without central heating.

cards.name: Deputy Dumble-Dodge
cards.desc: Can dodge a lightning bolt by leaning to the left at the last second.
cards.imagePrompt: Agile wizard in denim robes dodging a spell, motion blur effect, action portrait.
cards.imagePromptBack: Dynamic lightning bolt theme, speed-lines on stats panel, silver foil detailing.
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: His reflexes are so sharp he once caught a Golden Snitch while checking his rearview mirror.

cards.name: Friday Night Football Mage
cards.desc: Uses levitation charms to ensure his pass is always a touchdown.
cards.imagePrompt: Athlete wizard in stadium lights holding an enchanted football, digital illustration.
cards.imagePromptBack: Turf-textured border, stadium scoreboard design for stats, matte finish.
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: The referees never call him on it because his illusions make the ball look like it's just spinning fast.

cards.name: Cornfield Conjurer
cards.desc: The only mage who can talk to scarecrows and get helpful agricultural tips.
cards.imagePrompt: Wizard standing in a glowing cornfield, golden hour, wide shot digital art.
cards.imagePromptBack: Stalk-pattern border, golden yellow stats box, textured cardstock.
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: He says the corn whispers the future, but it usually just asks for more fertilizer.

cards.name: Star-Spangled Sorcerer
cards.desc: Throws fireworks from his fingers that form giant bald eagles.
cards.imagePrompt: Wizard in patriotic robes casting sparklers into the sky, cinematic lighting.
cards.imagePromptBack: Red, white, and blue motif, metallic gold stats shield, embossed finish.
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: His presence is enough to make any dark wizard feel slightly less evil and a bit more patriotic.

cards.name: Trailer Park Transmuter
cards.desc: Can change a rusted soda can into a pristine gold watch.
cards.imagePrompt: Wizard standing in front of a magical trailer home, sunset, detailed digital art.
cards.imagePromptBack: Aluminum siding background, metallic blue stats grid, glossy finish.
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: He says everything has potential if you cast the right spell and have a little bit of patience.

cards.name: Biker Coven Leader
cards.desc: Leads a motorcycle gang that rides enchanted Harleys across the sky.
cards.imagePrompt: Witch in leather jacket riding a flying motorbike, thunder clouds, digital art.
cards.imagePromptBack: Black leather texture background, flame-pattern stats border, embossed silver.
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: She doesn't follow the broomstick lane laws, mostly because she's too fast for the aurors to catch.

cards.name: Suburban Spell-Check
cards.desc: Ensures every HOA member is following the lawn-care hex guidelines.
cards.imagePrompt: Wizard with a clipboard and wand checking grass height, suburban street.
cards.imagePromptBack: White picket fence border, clipboard-themed stats area, satin finish.
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: He'll hex your hedges if they grow an inch over regulation. It's for the neighborhood aesthetic.

cards.name: Garage Sale Ghost
cards.desc: Haunts antique shops searching for his missing enchanted spatula.
cards.imagePrompt: Translucent wizard ghostly hovering over a table of junk, nostalgic lighting.
cards.imagePromptBack: Sepia-toned background, dusty shop texture, worn-edge card finish.
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: He's been dead for eighty years, but he still insists that spatula is worth more than five dollars.

cards.name: Route 66 Warlock
cards.desc: Knows every shortcut between magical hidden towns across the heartland.
cards.imagePrompt: Wizard standing on an old asphalt road, desert horizon, iconic American landscape art.
cards.imagePromptBack: Road-map background style, neon-sign font for stats, matte finish.
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: If you pick him up hitchhiking, he'll hex your engine into running on moonbeams.

cards.name: Fast Food Alchemist
cards.desc: Can transform a soggy fry into a gourmet meal with a flick of his wrist.
cards.imagePrompt: Wizard in a fast-food uniform holding a glowing burger, vibrant colors.
cards.imagePromptBack: Fast-food red and yellow theme, tray-liner textured stats, glossy finish.
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: He says the secret ingredient is always a drop of Phoenix tears and extra salt.

cards.name: High School Quidditch Coach
cards.desc: Still believes he could have gone pro if not for that fateful Bludger injury.
cards.imagePrompt: Older wizard with a whistle and clipboard on a pitch, nostalgic stadium art.
cards.imagePromptBack: Varsity-jacket font for stats, scoreboard background, textured finish.
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: He makes the team practice at 5 AM, but admits his own glory days are long behind him.

cards.name: Cactus Juice Conjurer
cards.desc: Learned his magic in the desert and won't shut up about it.
cards.imagePrompt: Wizard with cactus spikes in his robes, arid desert sunset, vibrant art.
cards.imagePromptBack: Succulent greenery border, sand-colored stats panel, matte finish.
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: His spells leave a strange prickly sensation on your skin, but they last ten times longer.

cards.name: The Great Bayou Mage
cards.desc: Lives in a floating shack and controls the swamp gators with music.
cards.imagePrompt: Wizard playing a fiddle on a boat in a misty swamp, dark mystical atmosphere.
cards.imagePromptBack: Moss-covered wood texture, swamp-green stats font, metallic bronze finish.
cards.imagePromptBackFlavor: The gators don't bite when he plays; they prefer to tap their tails to the rhythm.

productIdentity.collectorHook: premium product identity with loud showcase hits
productIdentity.checklistPhilosophy: template-led release built for annual continuity and serial collecting

packaging.shelfPitch: flagship checklist breadth with premium chase pressure

chaseArchitecture.chaseNarrative: the release is designed so the rainbow itself becomes a metagame
